message:
chore(deps): bump rusqlite 0.39.0, toml 1.0.7, action-download-artifact v19

Apply dependency upgrades from closed dependabot PRs:
- rusqlite: 0.38.0 -> 0.39.0
- toml: 1.0.3 -> 1.0.7
- dawidd6/action-download-artifact: v17 -> v19

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -48,7 +48,7 @@ jobs:
           cache-on-failure: true
 
       - name: Download baseline (if exists)
-        uses: dawidd6/action-download-artifact@v17
+        uses: dawidd6/action-download-artifact@v19
         with:
           workflow: bench.yml
           branch: main

  "gix-utils 0.2.0",
  "itoa",
